# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_omevv_firmware_repository_profile (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `catalog_path` (String) Absolute path of the catalog. HTTP, HTTPS, NFS, and CIFS paths are supported. This parameter is required when *state* is `present`.
- `description` (String) Description of OMEVV firmware repository profile.
- `name` (String) Name of the OMEVV firmware repository profile. This parameter is required for modification operation when *state* is `absent`.
- `new_name` (String) Name of the new OMEVV profile name when modify operation is performed.
- `password` (String) OpenManage Enterprise or OpenManage Enterprise Modular password. If *resync* is true, then *password* is required.
- `protocol_type` (String) `NFS` represents the NFS share path. `CIFS` represents the NFS share path. `HTTP` represents the HTTP share path. `HTTPS` represents the HTTPS share path. This parameter is required when *state* is `present` and a new profile is created.
- `resync` (Boolean) Sync the repository profile from the UMP plugin.
- `share_domain` (String) Domain of the share.
- `share_password` (String) Password of the share. This parameter is required when *catalog_path* is HTTPS or CIFS.
- `share_username` (String) Username of the share. This parameter is required when *catalog_path* is HTTPS or CIFS.
- `state` (String) `present` creates an OMEVV firmware repository profile or modifies an existing profile if the profile with the same name exists. `absent` deletes the OMEVV firmware repository profile. Either *profile_name* or *profile_id* is required when *state* is `absent`.
- `username` (String) OpenManage Enterprise or OpenManage Enterprise Modular username. If *resync* is true, then *username* is required.

### Read-Only

- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `msg` (String) Status of the profile operation.
